economic_notes: First Nation operates solar projects (NFN Solar LP, Nipissing Solar SPN LP), forestry (N'Bisiing Forestry Inc.), community developments (Nipissing Community Developments LP), and Bineshii Projects LP. Holds Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust with investments of ~$82.6M cost value. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with noted potential future impacts.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Boundary Claim Trust investment income of $7,502,788 is included in annual surplus and represents a significant recurring but trust-restricted revenue item. Restricted assets of $82,624,826 relate to the Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust and are not available for normal operations. Trust consolidated on December 31, 2019 year-end basis. 11 consolidated subsidiaries including solar LPs, forestry, community development and real estate entities. No schedule of remuneration provided. Health Canada revenue was $0 in 2020 vs $2,016,687 in 2019 — significant year-over-year change. OSR calculated as total revenue $32,840,038 minus all government transfers ($6,898,985 ISC + $2,018,683 MCSS + $1,436,289 OFNLP + $653,172 MOE + $4,597,690 other provincial + $6,065,688 KEB + $1,276,300 UOI + $287,068 CMHC = $23,233,875) = approximately $9,606,163. Budget information was not presented.
